account_id.title: Account ID
account_id.description: Microsoft Advertising account identifier used for reporting scope.

access_token.title: Access Token
access_token.description: OAuth access token for a user with access to the Microsoft Advertising account.

start_date.title: Start Date
start_date.description: UTC date to begin incremental collection (YYYY-MM-DD).

end_date.title: End Date
end_date.description: Optional UTC date to stop incremental collection. Leave unset for ongoing syncs.

lookback_window_days.title: Lookback Window
lookback_window_days.description: Days to subtract from the checkpoint when replaying incremental slices.

slice_span_days.title: Slice Span
slice_span_days.description: Number of days to request per reporting job.

page_size.title: Page Size
page_size.description: Maximum rows requested per reporting job.

timezone.title: Timezone
timezone.description: Operational timezone used to anchor reporting windows.
